hooks.command: PLUGIN_ROOT="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; if [ -z "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ] || [ ! -f "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/skybox-enforce.js" ]; then exit 0; fi; node "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/skybox-enforce.js"
